# Cross Platform Terminal (CPT)

> A cross-platform terminal and developer workspace that runs identically on Linux, Windows, and macOS. No setup required — extract and run.

## What is CPT?

Cross Platform Terminal (CPT) is a GPU-accelerated terminal emulator and developer workspace built for developers who work across multiple operating systems. It provides a consistent environment — same shortcuts, same layout, same behaviour — regardless of the platform.

## Key Features

- **GPU-accelerated rendering**: The entire terminal grid renders in a single GPU draw call. Smooth scrolling at any size with no CPU overhead.
- **Full VT support**: PTY-backed terminal emulator with tabbed sessions and scrollback. Works out of the box with no quirks.
- **Dockable panels and widgets**: Unlimited views, file browser widget, and a fully configurable layout.
- **AI Workflow Pipeline**: Native integration with Claude Code and GitHub Copilot. Automatic AI tool detection with status badge.
- **Cross-platform quirks resolution**: Rendering glitches, escape sequence mismatches, and input edge cases are caught and fixed automatically.
- **1-day bugfix guarantee**: Bugs reported by subscribers are fixed and shipped within one business day.
- **In-app auto-update**: Always on the latest version without manual downloads.

## Platforms

- Linux (AppImage and tar.gz)
- Windows
- macOS (coming soon)

## Pricing

- **€8/month** — Pro plan, everything included, cancel any time.
- All future updates included in the subscription.
